security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: http://localhost:3000 http://127.0.0.1:3000 https://*.supabase.co https://www.bezgrow.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:3000 http://127.0.0.1:3000 https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://www.bezgrow.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
